settings.description: Defines the behaviour of VBlood bosses. Relaxed: bosses use simpler mechanics. Normal: bosses use default mechanics. Hard (Brutal): bosses use advanced mechanics and behaviours.

Defines the base ruleset for player vs player interaction. PvE: Players cannot damage other players or their castles. PvP: Player and castle damage is enabled, governed by PlayerDamageMode and CastleDamageMode.

Defines if vampires can deal damage to other players. Only active when GameModeType is PvP. Always: PvP damage is always active. TimeRestricted: PvP damage only occurs during the VSPlayer scheduled windows.

Defines if vampires can deal damage to other players' castles. Only active when GameModeType is PvP. Never: Castles cannot be damaged by players. Always: Castles can always be damaged. TimeRestricted: Castles can only be damaged during the VSCastle scheduled windows.

Defines if players can destroy or take over other players' castle hearts. CanBeDestroyedOnlyWhenDecaying: Castle hearts can only be destroyed when the castle has no Blood Essence. CanBeDestroyedByPlayers: Castle hearts can be destroyed by players (subject to CastleDamageMode). CanBeSeizedOrDestroyedByPlayers: Castle hearts can additionally be seized, transferring ownership to the attacker.
Determines the health of the Siege Golem Stone Form used to breach enemy castles. Higher values give attackers more durability before the golem is destroyed by defenders.
How long newly created vampires are protected against PvP damage. The immunity is applied on character creation and expires after the specified duration of in-game time has passed.

Defines which players are allowed to access a death container (the loot bag dropped when a player dies). Anyone: Any player can loot it. ClanMembers: Only the deceased's clan members can loot it. OnlySelf: Only the player who died can loot their own container.

Determines how Soul Shards are placed in the world. Unique: Only one instance of each Soul Shard type can exist at a time, no duplicate of that type will spawn. Plentiful: Multiple instances of each Soul Shard type can exist simultaneously. Lowering limits will not affect already looted shards.
Enable the global chat channel visible to all players on the server.
All waygate fast-travel points are unlocked on the world map for all players from the start.

settings.uiName: Allow players to loot enemy storage
settings.description: Allow players to access and loot enemy stashes and workstations. Does not include death containers.
Most equipment will not drop on death and cannot be traded between players. Excludes hats.
Certain items prevent the player from using waygates while carrying them.
When true, having Soul Shards will prevent you from transforming into a bat.
Soul Shards prevent the player from using bat form while carrying them.
Maximum number of players that can be in a single clan.

Number of weapon/action bar slots available to each player. Reduces the number of weapons a player can equip. Values above 8 are clamped to 8. 0 will prevent any weapon from equipping if not already equipped.
Defines if raiding another player's castle is free or has a cost. When true, raiding requires no key materials to initiate.
Defines if claiming another player's castle is free or has a cost. When true, seizing a castle heart requires no key materials.
Defines if destroying another player's castle is free or has a cost. When true, destroying a castle heart requires no key materials.
Automatically destroy a player's vampire after they have been offline for too long, based on gear level.
Minimum seconds offline before inactivity kill can trigger. Default is 1 hour (3600s).
Maximum seconds offline before inactivity kill triggers. Default is 7 days (604800s).
Extra inactivity protection time granted when the player is inside their castle territory. Default is 48 hours (172800s).

The item level at which a character receives the maximum inactivity time. The actual inactivity timer is interpolated between InactivityKillTimeMin and InactivityKillTimeMax based on the character's item level from 0 to this value.
Remove an offline player's physical body from the world after the disconnect timer expires.
Seconds after disconnecting before the player's body is removed from the world.
Seconds of sun immunity granted to a vampire after disconnecting. Default is 5 minutes.
Multiplies the maximum stack size for all items in inventory.
Multiplier on loot dropped from general enemies and containers. Overridden by GameDifficulty presets.
Multiplies the quantity of loot received from successful servant hunts.
Multiplies the ratio of Stygian Shards dropped from enemies, breakables, chests, and incursion crystals.
Multiplier on the durability loss rate for Soul Shards.
Multiplies the resources received from harvesting trees, minerals, and plants.
Multiplies the amount of Blood Essence received from defeating enemies.
Multiplies the respawn timer duration after being killed in PvP.
Multiplier on how quickly a vampire's blood pool drains. Overridden by GameDifficulty presets.
Multiplier on the rate at which Garlic stacks when a vampire is exposed to it.
Multiplier on the strength of the Holy Radiation status effect dealt to vampires.
Multiplier on the damage received from carrying silver items (including silver coins).
Multiplier on the rate of sun damage dealt to vampires. Overridden by GameDifficulty presets.
Multiplier on equipment durability loss from combat and use.

settings.uiName: Durability Loss upon Death in PvP
settings.description: The fraction of durability lost by equipment upon death in PvP combat.

settings.uiName: Durability Loss as Resource Drop (PvP Only)
settings.description: Fraction of durability loss that is converted to dropped resources instead of being destroyed. 0 = all lost, 1 = all dropped as resources.
All quests and research below this gear level are automatically completed for newly created characters.
Prefab ID of the starter equipment kit given to newly created characters. 0 means no starter equipment. Only applies on character creation.

settings.description: Multiplier on material costs to construct castle structures.
Multiplier on material costs for crafting recipes.
Multiplier on crafting speed in crafting stations. Higher values result in faster crafting.
Multiplier on resource costs to research technologies.
Multiplier on material costs for refinement recipes.
Multiplier on refinement speed. Higher values result in faster refinement.
Multiplier on resources returned when dismantling structures.
Multiplier on the speed at which humans are converted into servants.
Multiplier on material costs to repair equipment.
Multiplier on the rate at which castle structures decay when the Castle Heart has no Blood Essence.
Multiplier on the rate at which the Castle Heart drains its Blood Essence for upkeep.
Duration in seconds a siege golem's breach is active. During a breach, new structures cannot be built and existing structures can be damaged. Default is 7 minutes.
Duration in seconds the 'under attack' state persists after the last siege golem hit, explosion, or direct heart damage.
Duration of a castle raid in seconds. While raiding, castle defenses are down. Default is 10 minutes.
Cooldown between raids on the same castle in seconds. Default is 30 minutes.
Seconds a decayed or abandoned Castle Heart can be freely claimed without materials. Default is 5 minutes.
Allow players to relocate their castle to an unoccupied territory.
Cooldown in seconds before a castle can be relocated again. Default is 3 hours.
Broadcast a server-wide chat message when a Siege Golem is summoned.
Show the locations of active Siege Golems on the world map for all players.
Total length of one in-game day cycle in real seconds. Default is 18 minutes (1080s).
Hour when daytime begins for sun damage purposes. 24-hour format.
Minute offset for day start hour.
Hour when daytime ends. 24-hour format.
Minute offset for day end hour.
Minimum number of in-game days between Blood Moons.
Maximum number of in-game days between Blood Moons.
Movement speed buff fraction applied to players during a Blood Moon. 0.2 = +20%.
Multiplies the maximum health of all player vampires.
Multiplies physical (melee and ranged) damage of all player vampires.
Multiplies spell and ability damage (and healing) of all player vampires.
Multiplies resource gathering power (damage dealt to resource objects) of all player vampires.
Multiplies any damage received by player vampires.
Seconds a player must wait before cancelling a revive in progress.
Multiplies the maximum health of all standard (non-VBlood) enemy units. Overridden by GameDifficulty presets. Requires unit respawn to take effect.
Multiplies the damage output of all standard enemy units. Overridden by GameDifficulty presets.
Flat level bonus added to all standard (non-VBlood) enemy units. Overridden by GameDifficulty presets.
Multiplies the maximum health of V Blood boss units. Overridden by GameDifficulty presets.
Multiplies the damage output of V Blood boss units. Overridden by GameDifficulty presets.
Flat level bonus added to all V Blood bosses. Overridden by GameDifficulty presets.
Multiplies the max health bonus granted by all player equipment.
Multiplies the resource yield bonus granted by equipment.
Multiplies the physical power bonus granted by equipment.
Multiplies the spell power bonus granted by equipment.
Multiplies the movement speed bonus granted by equipment.
settings.notes: Unused per official documentation. Server validates and clamps this value but it has no in-game effect.

settings.description: How often (in seconds) castle decay damage is recalculated and applied.
Maximum number of Vampire Lockbox (safety box) structures per castle.
Maximum number of Eye of Darkness structures per castle.
Maximum number of Tomb structures per castle.
Maximum number of Vermin Nest structures per castle.
Maximum number of Prison Cell structures per castle.
Maximum number of separate castles a player or clan can claim, depending on CastleHeartLimitType.
Determines if the CastleLimit applies per player or per clan. User: Each player can own up to CastleLimit castles individually. Clan: The CastleLimit is shared across the entire clan.
Maximum number of Stygian Summoning Circle (Nether Gate) structures per castle.
Maximum number of Throne of Darkness structures per castle.
Maximum number of Arena Station structures per castle.
settings.notes: ⚠️ Values above 255 will cause an overflow exception and crash the server. No clamp warning is generated, the server just crashes.

settings.description: Maximum number of Routing Station structures per castle.
settings.notes: ⚠️ Values above 255 will cause an overflow exception and crash the server. No clamp warning is generated, the server just crashes.

Time zone used for all PvP and siege schedule windows. Accepts 'Local' (server system time), 'UTC', or named zones like 'EST', 'PST', 'CET', 'CST'.
Weekday PvP window start hour (24-hour format).
Weekday PvP window start minute.
Weekday PvP window end hour (24-hour format).
Weekday PvP window end minute.
Weekend PvP window start hour (24-hour format).
Weekend PvP window start minute.
Weekend PvP window end hour (24-hour format).
Weekend PvP window end minute.

Weekend castle siege window end minute.
Multiplies the stock quantity available from traders.
Multiplies the cost of items sold by traders.
Multiplies the duration of the trader restock timer. Higher values mean longer waits between restocks.

Time between Incursion events. Accepts enum-style int values: 0 Minimum (30 min), 1 VeryShort (1 hr), 2 Short (1.5 hrs), 3 Medium (2 hrs), 4 Long (4 hrs), 5 VeryLong (8 hrs), 6 Extensive (12 hrs), 7 Maximum (24 hrs).

Duration of major Incursion events. Same enum-style int scale: 0 Minimum (15 min), 1 VeryShort (20 min), 2 Short (25 min), 3 Medium (30 min), 4 Long (35 min), 5 VeryLong (45 min), 6 Extensive (1 hr), 7 Maximum (2 hrs).

Duration of minor Incursion events. Same enum-style int scale as MajorDuration: 0 Minimum (15 min), 1 VeryShort (20 min), 2 Short (25 min), 3 Medium (30 min), 4 Long (35 min), 5 VeryLong (45 min), 6 Extensive (1 hr), 7 Maximum (2 hrs).
Weekday Incursion window start hour (24-hour format).
Weekday Incursion window start minute.
Weekday Incursion window end hour (24-hour format).
Weekday Incursion window end minute.
Weekend Incursion window start hour (24-hour format).
Weekend Incursion window start minute.
Weekend Incursion window end hour (24-hour format).
Weekend Incursion window end minute.
Points (enemies) required to shatter the Stygian Shard for 1 player on the local activity grid.
Loot quantity dropped from a shattered Stygian Shard for 1 player on the local activity grid.
Shard point multiplier for 2 players on the local activity grid.
Shard drop multiplier for 2 players on the local activity grid.
Shard point multiplier for 3 players on the local activity grid.
Shard drop multiplier for 3 players on the local activity grid.
Shard point multiplier for 4+ players on the local activity grid.
Shard drop multiplier for 4+ players on the local activity grid.

Per-boss configuration for VBlood units. Each entry in the array is an object with three fields:
UnitId (int) - prefab ID of the VBlood boss
UnitLevel (int) - level override for the boss
DefaultUnlocked (bool) - when true, newly created characters begin with this boss's powers and recipes already unlocked

UnitLevel changes require the boss to respawn. DefaultUnlocked only applies on character creation.
